message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam class {
  BackgroundColor White
  BorderColor Black
  ArrowColor Black
}

package "Controller" {
    class MainController
}

package "DataBase" {
    class DAO
    class DAODisease
    class DAOUser
}

package "Model" {
    class User
    class MedList
    class Calendar
    class Day
    class Food
    class Reminder
    class Task
    class Med
    class Disease
    class UserAppearenceInfo
}

MainController -- DataBase : gets and updates information
MainController -- Model : manipulates and updates

DAO <|-- DAODisease
DAO <|-- DAOUser

User "1" -- "1" MedList : has
User "1" -- "1" Calendar : has
User "1" -- "1" UserAppearenceInfo : describes
User "1" -- "*" Disease : has

MedList "1" *-- "*" Med : contains
Calendar "1" *-- "*" Day : contains

Day "1" o-- "*" Food : contains
Day "1" o-- "*" Reminder : contains
Day "1" o-- "*" Task : contains

@enduml
```
